programme.desc: Laras was pressured to express his decision to live without children when his in-laws asked him to adopt a child because he was deemed unable to produce offspring.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Enersto, a hunting guide in Patagonia, is left to take care of his teenage son he hasn’t seen for years. An intense father-son relationship is played out amidst the hostility of nature.

programme.title: Tokyo Fianc
programme.desc: A charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery. Amélie, a Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with Rinri, a Francophile Japanese student.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: The Daval Mystery
programme.desc: Jonathann Daval reports the disappearance of his wife Alexia after she fails to return from her morning jog. Over the next three months, the police will launch the most relentless investigation into a media saga that will shake the whole of France.

programme.title: Falling Into Place
programme.desc: Kira and Ian meet all too briefly over a winter weekend on the Isle of Skye and form a sudden and deep bond. Back in London, they try to move on with their separate lives - but both have to stop running from themselves before they are ready to meet again.

programme.title: Victoria Must Go
programme.desc: Hedvig and Henrik's new stepmother Victoria is annoying and constantly introducing new rules. They decide to hire a hitman to get rid of her, and end up persuading a very reluctant immigrant, Carl, to do the job.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Train Driver's Diary
programme.desc: As Ilija nears retirement, his record of unintentional deaths as a train driver weighs heavy. His adopted son, Sima, fears following in his footsteps. But as days pass without incident, Ilija's determination to ensure Sima's success takes a dark turn.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: The film tells the stories of different people and how they are intertwined surrounding the gruesome death of a man who got thrown out of a window.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: A Tale of Samurai Cooking - A True Love Story
programme.desc: Great cook Haru has married into the legendary “Kitchen Samurai” family. But her husband who is the successor of the Funaki family cannot cook at all. Haru makes a vow to make him a superb samurai chef and starts teaching her new husband how to cook.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: The Audition
programme.desc: Violin teacher Anna Bronsky detects remarkable talent in a student, Alexander. Anna becomes obsessed with mentoring him, neglecting her family and spiralling under mounting pressure. As her fixation overtakes her, all is staked on exam day.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: The film tells the stories of different people and how they are intertwined surrounding the gruesome death of a man who got thrown out of a window.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: A Tale of Samurai Cooking - A True Love Story
programme.desc: Great cook Haru has married into the legendary “Kitchen Samurai” family. But her husband who is the successor of the Funaki family cannot cook at all. Haru makes a vow to make him a superb samurai chef and starts teaching her new husband how to cook.

programme.title: Celeste
programme.desc: Living in the lush rainforest of Northern Queensland, a retired opera diva prepares for one final performance. Her late husband's son Jack arrives, haunted by the past, only to discover that Celeste has one last request for him.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghosts Of The Past
programme.desc: Ex-gang leader Degen escapes prison after 19 years, putting inspector Sarah Kohr and prosecutor Anton Mehringer in danger. Unable to count on the authorities without risking their secrets, they must confront their pasts when Degen kidnaps Anton's son.

programme.title: Stormskerry Maja
programme.desc: At 17, Maja marries humble fisherman Janne and starts a family on the remote island of Stormskerry, where survival is a constant challenge. Amidst the hardships, Maja awakens to her potential, finding resilience and a love that transcends life and death.

programme.title: Sweet Squad
programme.desc: In Kalimantan Barat, teenager Rizal faces a daunting choice to become a sugar courier across the Indonesian-Malaysian border to fund his mother's medical bills. With friends Iwan and Ajung, they risk it all for a chance at saving his mother’s life.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Money Mind - EP 43
programme.desc: Oil at 100: hedge, rebalance, or stay the course? The financial cost of flooding in the Philippines. How easy online loans are trapping young Indonesians in spiralling debt cycles.

programme.desc: We eat protein bars thinking they’re healthy — high in protein, low in sugar and good for muscle recovery. But what’s really inside them, and are they as healthy as they claim?

programme.title: Tempahan Eid
programme.desc: Eid is a seamstress who aims to continue her late grandmother's legacy. She struggles to earn the trust of her grandmother's customers and has a hard time to find new clients as more people are buying online and no longer appreciate traditional hand-sewn details. As Hari Raya approaches, Eid, struggles to finish the orders. In addition, she has to restore her reputation that is ruined by an unhappy customer's viral video.

programme.title: Saat Hilang Tong Gas Mu
programme.desc: Azal works tirelessly, driving trucks during the day and selling bundles online at night after Azrina's parent request a dowry of RM20,000 for their marriage. When his lorry is stolen, he manages to recover it, but discovers that 200 gas cylinders worth RM20,000 are missing. With the wedding just a month away, Azal must find the money or risk losing Azrina.

programme.title: Ubi Superstar Raya
programme.desc: Get ready for a Raya celebration like no other with Ubi Superstar Raya! Packed with hilarious sketches, catchy musical parodies and plenty of festive cheer. This comedy stage special brings together the funniest highlights of Ubi for non-stop laughs.

programme.title: Gotong-Royong S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: In attempting to host a sports day event for the students of MIJ Hub, Muslims with Muscles are having difficulties as they lack experience. With coaches from the Eastern Rebels Rugby Group, will the team be able to carry out their plan successfully?

programme.title: Zaman Sekolah S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: "Zaman Sekolah" is a nostalgic journey back to the cherished days of schooling, where life-long memories and foundations were built. Each episode dives deep into the heart of what school life meant for our celebrity guests who return to their alma maters to relive and share their most poignant and formative experiences.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 3
programme.desc: Mahani gets frustrated when Razak begins to come home late after tarawih prayers because he is enjoying his teh tarik sessions with Umar and Rahim. When Farah and Ratna both approach their rich relative for a donation, tensions arise between them.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 4
programme.desc: Maria and her siblings, Mardiana and Malik get into a major argument which starts after the siblings accuse her of meddling in their affairs and having a holier than thou attitude. Farah confronts Ratna about "hijacking" her rich donor.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S10 - EP 5
programme.desc: In the 10th season of Upin & Ipin, include the twins and friends playing a game in a futuristic field, learning about a new celebration, and finding strange creatures in the village.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 19
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Mimpi Raya
programme.desc: Muaz and Faiz, competitive cousins in their mid-20s, rarely see eye to eye. When their grandmother, Nek Mah, needs help preparing dishes for Hari Raya, both eagerly volunteer - not out of love for cooking, but to impress her stunning neighbor, Aliza. Neither has cooking experience, but they see this as their chance to win her attention. However, Aliza's protective father, Pak Budi, is a formidable obstacle, and their antics only fuel his frustration As they prepare for Raya, the cousins' rivalr

programme.title: Tetamu Ramadan - EP 6
programme.desc: As Salahudin and Rozainah prepares for Hari Raya celebration, Rashid takes the opportunity to attend career fair with Salahudin. Meanwhile Nina continues with her charitable contributions in Ramadan as she tries to forget about Farid. Salahudin finally approves of Farid but Farid tells him that hes already made up his mind to return to London for Hari Raya. What happen when Nina finds out Farid is going back? Will the couple get back together in time for Hari Raya? Tune in to the final episode

programme.title: Travelawak Projek Bapak Bapak Balik Kampung
programme.desc: Join Bapak-Bapak geng as Tok Ram and Jatt Ali introduce Tok Jalal and Roy Azman what is like to Raya in Singapore

programme.title: Hard To Heart S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will uncover stories that have never been shared with the country's celebrities and new host, Awal Ashaari.

programme.title: Spontan Balik raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Spontan Balik Raya will see the return of Spontan contestants from previous seasons. They will visit villages across Malaysia and play Spontan Games with the villagers

programme.title: Terompak Sana Tertukar Sini
programme.desc: When Julia and her bankrrupt husband, Romi, learn about their child's serious health condition, they become desperate to find money for treatment. In a momnet of desperation, they plan a robbery. However, a strange and magical incident causes them to switch body. Romi is suddenly force to deal with the challenges of being a woman, while Julia must navigate life as a man. Will they be able to find a way to return to their original bodies?

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S10 - EP 5
programme.desc: In the 10th season of Upin & Ipin, include the twins and friends playing a game in a futuristic field, learning about a new celebration, and finding strange creatures in the village.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 20
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Al Raya - EP 2
programme.desc: Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya & Ebby Yus will enliven your Raya celebration with funny & entertaining skits. Watch the appearance of guest celebrities such as Ummi Nazeera, Eja, Lisdawati, Qasrina and many more.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Andai Tiada Suri - EP 5
programme.desc: Hisyam Hamid and Zahiril Adzim from the hit drama Andai Tiada Dia swap scripts for spatulas as they step into the kitchen together. Catch the laughter as they fumble and have fun cooking classic Ramadan favourites all under the watchful and witty guidance of Malaysia's iconic TV Moms.

programme.title: Reeza GTR
programme.desc: Reeza, a young man with a big heart and principle in life. He works in a car shop and love fast cars. He is on the verge of achieving his dreams when one day he meets the beautiful Myra hiding in the trunk of his car. Thereafter, his life turns chaotic and is never the same again as he tries to save Myra from an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Air Tangan - EP 2
programme.desc: Content creator Emmireen Norman, who can't cook, gets together with his aunt, Madam Miseriah, an accomplish cook, to create a favourite dish of the family, lemak tumis telur. Tradition then meets modernity as Madam Miseriah uses her skills to make Beef Rendang Tacos.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Baba Papa Nak Raya!
programme.desc: Latif, Liana, Lutfi, Izzaty and Rugayah are all busy preparing for Hari Raya. Latif and Rugayah are overseeing the surge in orders for their instant rendang paste business while Liana and Izzaty are busy with the Hari Raya decorations. But everyone's plans start coming undone when Latif's obnoxious brother and humblebrag sister-in-law, Luqman and Sara, who are based in Sydney, decide to come to Singapore to celebrate Hari Raya with the family!

programme.title: Baba Papa Nak Raya!
programme.desc: Latif, Liana, Lutfi, Izzaty and Rugayah are all busy preparing for Hari Raya. Latif and Rugayah are overseeing the surge in orders for their instant rendang paste business while Liana and Izzaty are busy with the Hari Raya decorations. programme.title: Gotong-Royong S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Babes need help in getting supplies for their beneficiaries. Fauzie and Abam Abam Trailers' begin looking for the supplies needed. Crazycat, joins in to host a sharing session with these pregnant teens. In this two-pronged effort by both organisations, will Babes get the support that they require?

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 5
programme.desc: Umar, Abdullah and Azizah come up with a plan to try to reconcile the Farah dan Ratna. Amidst the tensions, Mardiana, Maria and Malik have different plans on how to celebrate the first day of Hari Raya. This means that Maria may not be able to fulfil one of her mother's dying wishes.

programme.title: Bantal Buruk Saloma - EP 1
programme.desc: BANTAL BURUK SALOMA is a social drama about foster parenting that centres around family, life, love and forming relationships that lasts a lifetime. But it comes with serious challenges, especially when Aidilfitri approaches. Aidilfitri is a happy time for most kids. But for kids in orphanage or foster care, it is not easy. Some miss their parents.

programme.title: Bantal Buruk Saloma - EP 2
programme.desc: BANTAL BURUK SALOMA is a social drama about foster parenting that centres around family, life, love and forming relationships that lasts a lifetime. But it comes with serious challenges, especially when Aidilfitri approaches. Aidilfitri is a happy time for most kids. But for kids in orphanage or foster care, it is not easy. programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 1
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Couple Cosmo - EP 6
programme.desc: Happy and Firman hear a shocking news from an uninvited guest. Remy receives a video and it is used to threaten him and Ruby. Who is behind all this and what is their reason for doing all these?

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 9
programme.desc: Amar sets off on a work trip with Farah and ends up falling in love with her. Luqman is shocked when he sees them together at the hotel.

programme.desc: Reeza, a young man with a big heart and principle in life. He works in a car shop and love fast cars. He is on the verge of achieving his dreams when one day he meets the beautiful Myra hiding in the trunk of his car. Thereafter, his life turns chaotic and is never the same again as he tries to save Myra from an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 22
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.
